name: Financial Statement Upload Webhook - Full Financial Metrics + Google Sheets

parameters.jsCode:
const src = $('Inspect Upload + Parse All Metrics').first().json;

const isAgentic = src && src.analysis_type === 'agentic_flow_result';

return [{
  json: {
    ok: true,
    message: isAgentic
      ? 'agentic_flow analysis received successfully in n8n and logged to Google Sheets.'
      : 'PDF received successfully in n8n and logged to Google Sheets.',
    receivedAt: src.receivedAt,
    analysis_type: src.analysis_type || (isAgentic ? 'agentic_flow_result' : 'pdf_upload'),

    // Recommendation (agentic_flow path)
    recommended_organisation: src.recommended_organisation || '',
    runner_up: src.runner_up || '',
    recommendation_reasons: src.recommendation_reasons || '',
    strengths: src.strengths || '',
    weaknesses: src.weaknesses || '',
    pdf_count: src.pdf_count || '',

    // Legacy sheet fields
    company_name: src.company_name,
    quarter: src.quarter,
    industry: src.industry,
    file_name: src.file_name,

    // Ratios
    ratio_net_profit_margin: src.ratio_net_profit_margin || '',
    ratio_roa: src.ratio_roa,
    ratio_roe: src.ratio_roe,
    ratio_cost_to_income: src.ratio_cost_to_income,
    ratio_npl_ratio: src.ratio_npl_ratio,
    ratio_coverage_ratio: src.ratio_coverage_ratio,
    ratio_loan_to_deposit: src.ratio_loan_to_deposit,

    // PDF metadata (legacy path)
    pdf_sha256: src.pdf_sha256,
    pdf_page_count: src.pdf_page_count,
    pdf_word_count_sampled: src.pdf_word_count_sampled,

    // Line items (legacy path)
    income_total_operating_income: src.income_total_operating_income,
    income_profit_for_period: src.income_profit_for_period,
    bs_total_assets: src.bs_total_assets,

    sheet_update: 'success'
  }
}];
